scripts.setup:win: npm run rebuild && npm run rebuild:ort
scripts.check:ort: node -e "console.log('Checking onnxruntime-node installation...'); const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const bindingPath = path.join('node_modules', 'onnxruntime-node', 'bin', 'napi-v3', 'win32', 'x64', 'onnxruntime_binding.node'); console.log('Path:', bindingPath); console.log('Exists:', fs.existsSync(bindingPath)); if (fs.existsSync(bindingPath)) { const stats = fs.statSync(bindingPath); console.log('Size:', stats.size, 'bytes'); console.log('Modified:', stats.mtime); console.log('IsFile:', stats.isFile()); console.log('Readable:', fs.constants.R_OK, fs.accessSync(bindingPath, fs.constants.R_OK, (err) => !err)); try { console.log('Can require:', !!require(bindingPath)); } catch(e) { console.log('Require error:', e.message); } } const binDir = path.join('node_modules', 'onnxruntime-node', 'bin', 'napi-v3', 'win32', 'x64'); if (fs.existsSync(binDir)) { console.log('Bin directory contents:', fs.readdirSync(binDir)); }"
scripts.clean:ort: rmdir /s /q node_modules\onnxruntime-node 2>nul & del package-lock.json 2>nul & npm install onnxruntime-node
scripts.fix:ort: npm run clean:ort && npm run rebuild:ort
scripts.check:env: node -e "console.log('Node:', process.version); console.log('Arch:', process.arch); console.log('Platform:', process.platform); console.log('Electron:', require('electron/package.json').version); try { console.log('MSBuild:', require('child_process').execSync('where msbuild', {encoding:'utf8'}).trim()); } catch(e) { console.log('MSBuild: Not found'); } try { console.log('VS BuildTools:', require('child_process').execSync('where devenv || where msbuild', {encoding:'utf8', shell:true}).trim()); } catch(e) { console.log('VS BuildTools: Not found - Please install Visual Studio Build Tools'); }"
scripts.test:ort: node -e "console.log('Testing onnxruntime-node direct import...'); try { const ort = require('onnxruntime-node'); console.log('SUCCESS: onnxruntime-node loaded successfully'); console.log('Version:', ort.version || 'unknown'); console.log('Available providers:', ort.InferenceSession?.supportedBackends || 'unknown'); } catch(e) { console.log('ERROR:', e.message); console.log('Stack:', e.stack); }"
scripts.reinstall: npm run clean:all && npm cache clean --force && npm install
scripts.logs:show: echo "请在应用内通过日志查看器查看日志，或访问用户数据目录/logs文件夹"
scripts.logs:help: echo "日志功能: 1. 应用内访问 /logs 页面查看日志 2. 日志文件位于用户数据目录/logs 3. 支持实时查看、搜索、导出功能"
scripts.logs:path: echo "日志文件路径: %APPDATA%/Jevet/logs (Windows) 或 ~/Library/Application Support/Jevet/logs (Mac)"
